User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Türk Çocuk Akademisi platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

profileImageUrl.description: URL of the user's profile image.

role.description: The role of the user (e.g., parent, teacher, admin).

isPremium.description: Indicates if the user has a premium subscription.

premiumStartDate.description: The start date of the premium subscription.

premiumEndDate.description: The end date (renewal date) of the premium subscription.

lives.description: The number of shared lives the user has for all their children's games.

livesLastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the lives count was last updated, used for regeneration logic.

enrolledPackages.description: An array of strings representing the package IDs the user is enrolled in (e.g., ['4B', '12K']). This is a temporary holding area until packages are assigned to a child.

remainingLessons.description: The total number of UNASSIGNED lessons remaining from all purchased packages.

freeTrialsUsed.description: The number of free trial lessons used by the parent, max 3.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier for the user (e.g., 'Europe/Dublin').

bio.description: A short biography for teacher profiles.

hobbies.description: A list of hobbies for teacher profiles.

introVideoUrl.description: URL of the teacher's introduction video.

Child.title: Child
Child.description: Represents a child who is learning Turkish on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the child entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity who is the parent of this child.

isProfileComplete.description: Flag to indicate if the full profile information has been filled out.

countryOfResidence.description: The country where the child lives.

level.description: The current learning level of the child.

schoolLanguage.description: The primary language of instruction at the child's school.

homeLanguageTurkishPercentage.description: The percentage of Turkish spoken at home.

turkishExposureIntensity.description: The intensity of the child's exposure to Turkish.

schoolLiteracyStatus.description: Literacy status in their school language.

turkishLiteracyLevel.description: The child's Turkish reading and writing level.

turkishDifficulties.description: Areas where the child has difficulty with Turkish.

rozet.description: The number of badges the child has earned.

completedTopics.description: A list of completed topic keys.

assignedPackage.description: The package code assigned to this child (e.g., '12K').

assignedPackageName.description: The full name of the assigned package (e.g., 'Konuşma Kursu').

remainingLessons.description: Number of lessons remaining from their assigned package.

finishedPackage.description: The code of the last finished package by the child (e.g., '4B').

hasUsedFreeTrial.description: Indicates if this specific child has used their free trial lesson.

cefrProfile.description: Teacher's assessment of the child's CEFR levels.

speakingInitiative.description: Teacher's assessment of the child's speaking initiative percentage (0-100).

attitude.description: Teacher's assessment of the child's attitude in class.

languageMixing.description: Teacher's assessment of how often the child mixes languages.

weaknesses.description: Teacher-assessed areas for improvement for the student.

recommendedCourse.description: The course recommended by the teacher for this student.

feedbackHistory.description: A history of feedback provided by teachers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the feedback entry. Often the lessonId.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the feedback was created.

LessonSlot.title: Lesson Slot
LessonSlot.description: Represents a time slot for a lesson, which can be available or booked.

id.description: Unique identifier for the lesson slot.

teacherId.description: ID of the teacher who is available for this slot.

startTime.description: The start time of the lesson slot.

endTime.description: The end time of the lesson slot.

status.description: The current status of the slot.

bookedBy.description: ID of the user (parent) who booked this slot.

childId.description: ID of the child who will take the lesson.

packageCode.description: The code of the package used for this lesson (e.g., '12K', 'FREE_TRIAL').

feedback.description: Feedback provided by the teacher for a completed lesson.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the feedback was created or last updated.

Course.title: Course
Course.description: Represents a course or package offered on the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the course entity.

name.description: The name of the course (e.g., Başlangıç Kursu).

description.description: A description of the course content.

numberOfLessons.description: The number of lessons included in the course.

Enrollment.title: Enrollment
Enrollment.description: Represents a user's enrollment in a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the enrollment entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity who is enrolled. (Relationship: User 1:N Enrollment)

courseId.description: Reference to the Course entity that the user is enrolled in. (Relationship: Course 1:N Enrollment)

enrollmentDate.description: The date the user enrolled in the course.

progress.description: The user's progress in the course (e.g., percentage completed).

Lesson.title: Lesson
Lesson.description: Represents a single lesson within a course.

id.description: Unique identifier for the lesson entity.

courseId.description: Reference to the Course entity that this lesson belongs to. (Relationship: Course 1:N Lesson)

content.description: The content of the lesson (e.g., text, video URL).

order.description: The order of the lesson within the course.

Review.title: Review
Review.description: Represents a review or testimonial given by a parent.

id.description: Unique identifier for the review entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity who wrote the review. (Relationship: User 1:N Review)

rating.description: The rating given by the parent (e.g., 1-5 stars).

reviewDate.description: The date the review was submitted.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  Accessible only by the user with matching UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user, matching the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores child profiles associated with a user.  Only the parent user can access their children.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent user.

params.name: childId
params.description: The unique identifier for the child.

definition.description: Stores available and booked lesson time slots. Publicly readable, but writes are restricted.

params.name: slotId
params.description: The unique identifier for the lesson slot.

definition.description: Stores course information. Publicly readable, but creation/modification is restricted to admins.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the course.

definition.description: Stores enrollment data for each user.  Only the user can access their own enrollments.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: enrollmentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the enrollment.

definition.description: Stores lessons associated with a course. Publicly readable but creation/modification is restricted to admins.

params.name: courseId
params.description: The unique identifier for the course.

params.name: lessonId
params.description: The unique identifier for the lesson.

definition.description: Stores user reviews. Reviews are not stored within the user document but instead as top-level collections to allow for listing all reviews independently of user information. Reviews include a `userId` field to connect the review to the user.

params.name: reviewId
params.description: The unique identifier for the review.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to support the Türk Çocuk Akademisi platform, focusing on user data, child profiles, courses, enrollments, lessons, and reviews. The design prioritizes Authorization Independence, DBAC (Database-Based Access Control), and clear segregation of data based on access requirements.

**Authorization Independence:**

*   The primary method for ensuring authorization independence is through path-based ownership and avoiding `get()` calls in security rules. Data related to a specific user (e.g., children, enrollments, reviews) is stored under the `/users/{userId}` path, eliminating the need to fetch parent document data to authorize access.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**

*   **Path-Based Ownership:** User-specific data (children, enrollments, reviews) resides under `/users/{userId}`, ensuring only the authenticated user (or authorized admin) can access it.  This facilitates secure `list` operations as rules can simply check `request.auth.uid == userId`.

**Structure Overview:**

*   `/users/{userId}`: Stores user profiles. This uses path-based ownership, a user can only access their own profile.
*   `/users/{userId}/children/{childId}`: Stores child profiles associated with a user. This enforces that only a user can manage their own children.
*   `/courses/{courseId}`: Stores course information. No user-specific data is stored here, which means that to list courses a rule can simply check that get operations are allowed, i.e. `allow read: if true`. 
*   `/users/{userId}/enrollments/{enrollmentId}`: Stores enrollment data for each user. This allows a user to see what they are enrolled in and their progress. This follows a similar design as with the user's children.
*   `/courses/{courseId}/lessons/{lessonId}`: Stores lessons associated with a course. `list` operations are also straightforward, requiring a general read permission on courses and lessons, which can be refined based on enrollment status.
*   `/reviews/{reviewId}`: Stores user reviews. Reviews are not stored within the user document but instead as top-level collections to allow for listing all reviews independently of user information. Reviews include a `userId` field to connect the review to the user.

**Data Integrity and Invariants:**

*   Timestamps (where needed) should be managed server-side to ensure integrity.  Consider adding `createdAt` and `updatedAt` fields managed via server timestamps.
*   Ownership (`userId`) is explicitly stored in relevant documents (children, enrollments, reviews), enabling direct and secure access control.
